# G3 Fail Fixture

## Pre-mortem

Imagine the project has failed. What went wrong?

<!-- Only 3 failure causes listed -- below the required minimum of 5 -->
<!-- Also missing "early warning" keyword (uses "signal" instead) -->
<!-- Also missing "counter" keyword (uses "mitigation" instead) -->

1. Scope grew unchecked; signal: backlog doubles; mitigation: scope review.
2. Key person left; signal: absence patterns; mitigation: cross-training.
3. Budget cut mid-project; signal: budget drift; mitigation: reserve fund.
